name: Performage Plushfire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅｍ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイジ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヒグルミ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If a face-up "Performage" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone, then take 500 damage. You can only use this effect of "Performage Plushfire" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Performage" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Performage Plushfire". You can only use this effect of "Performage Plushfire" once per turn.
pend_eff: If a face-up "Performage" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone, then take 500 damage. You can only use this effect of "Performage Plushfire" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Performage" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Performage Plushfire". You can only use this effect of "Performage Plushfire" once per turn.
eff: If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Performage" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Performage Plushfire". You can only use this effect of "Performage Plushfire" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
